quick_skim.title: Differential Analysis of Multispectral Images for Terrain Identification
quick_skim.abstract: Reliable terrain understanding is a prerequisite for autonomous robot navigation. Yet, the widespread RGB-based perception can fail under low illumination, shadows, and material ambiguities. In this work we propose DRIFT, a lightweight multispectral framework that combines raw spectral bands and illumination-tolerant band-ratio representations through a dual-stream residual architecture and a differential fusion branch. Band ratios attenuate multiplicative acquisition effects (illumination/sensor gains), while the differential fusion explicitly highlights discrepancies between absolute-band and ratio-derived cues, which improves the robustness to noisy or partially unreliable spectral measurements. In the paper (i) we evaluate DRIFT on a new oil-on-soil multispectral dataset acquired using a MicaSense RedEdge-P camera mounted on an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle, and (ii) we provide an additional controlled study on water-on-grass under varying illumination and thermal perturbations (hot/cold water) to analyze NIR-sensitive effects. DRIFT consistently improves over strong baselines, while remaining compatible with edge deployment.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multispectral framework with band-ratio for illumination-invariant denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多光谱框架使用波段比率实现光照不变的噪声鲁棒性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多光谱框架使用波段比率实现光照不变的噪声鲁棒性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多光谱框架使用波段比率实现光照不变的噪声鲁棒性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DRIFT uses band ratios and differential fusion to suppress acquisition noise in multispectral images, offering denoising principles transferable to hyperspectral data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多光谱图像在光照变化下的噪声问题，提出DRIFT框架，通过波段比率和差分融合抑制乘性噪声，提高地形识别鲁棒性。该方法的核心思想可迁移至高光谱图像去噪，为处理波段间噪声提供了有效思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多光谱图像在光照变化下的噪声问题，提出DRIFT框架，通过波段比率和差分融合抑制乘性噪声，提高地形识别鲁棒性。该方法的核心思想可迁移至高光谱图像去噪，为处理波段间噪声提供了有效思路。
